<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>true</action_delete><action_insert>false</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>true</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>x_982322_tam_ver_0_x_fich_tam_did</collection><condition>current.operation() == 'delete' || current.active.changesTo(false)</condition><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>Disable x_982322_tam_ver_0_x_fich_tam_di</name><order>1000</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/ ) {
	new global.AisDisableSearchSignalEvent().disable(current.sys_id);
})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2025-10-23 19:20:21</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>3209278d8370321077469cb6feaad3f5</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Disable x_982322_tam_ver_0_x_fich_tam_di</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Technical Assistance Management" source="x_982322_technic_2">0dfe49e69733f190601fb998c253af18</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Technical Assistance Management">0dfe49e69733f190601fb998c253af18</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_3209278d8370321077469cb6feaad3f5</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2025-10-23 19:20:21</sys_updated_on><template/><when>after</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=3209278d8370321077469cb6feaad3f5"/></record_update>
